name: @aily-project/lib-dfrobot-c4001
author: Vonweller
description: C4001 是毫米波人体存在与运动检测雷达，可通过 I2C 或 UART 检测人体存在，并支持测距测速、灵敏度、检测范围、延时、PWM/IO 输出和微动检测配置。
description_zh_cn: C4001 是毫米波人体存在与运动检测雷达，可通过 I2C 或 UART 检测人体存在，并支持测距测速、灵敏度、检测范围、延时、PWM/IO 输出和微动检测配置。
description_en: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot C4001 mmWave human presence radar, supporting I2C/UART, presence detection, range and speed data, sensitivity, range, delay, PWM/IO output, and micro-motion settings.
description_zh_hk: C4001 是毫米波人體存在與運動偵測雷達，可透過 I2C 或 UART 偵測人體存在，並支援測距測速、靈敏度、偵測範圍、延時、PWM/IO 輸出和微動偵測設定。
description_ja: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot C4001 mmWave human presence radar, supporting I2C/UART, presence detection, range and speed data, sensitivity, range, delay, PWM/IO output, and micro-motion settings.
description_ko: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot C4001 mmWave human presence radar, supporting I2C/UART, presence detection, range and speed data, sensitivity, range, delay, PWM/IO output, and micro-motion settings.
